description_cn: 将一组点拉向平面。将选定点限制在指定的平面上。
description_en: Drag a set of points toward a plane. Restrict the selected points to a specified plane.

parameters.name: Plane
parameters.desc_en: Plane (default is the world XY plane)

parameters.name: Strength
parameters.desc_cn: 约束强度，值越大效果越明显
parameters.desc_en: Constraint strength, higher value gives stronger effect

author: Kangaroo Team
